nonBlockingIssues.description: LandingPage brainstorm card navigates via window.location.hash instead of react-router-dom's useNavigate. Works with HashRouter but bypasses router transition lifecycle.
JSON.parse in ws.onmessage has no try-catch — malformed server messages would throw unhandled exceptions. Inherited pattern from useGeminiLive.ts.
ScriptProcessorNode is deprecated (Web Audio API recommends AudioWorkletNode). Inherited from useGeminiLive.ts pattern — not a regression.

Image download is broken: downloadSingleArtifact and downloadAllArtifacts create Blobs from raw base64 strings instead of decoding to binary first. Downloaded images will be corrupt. Markdown downloads work fine. UI image display via data URIs is correct.
File size indicator is inflated ~33% for image artifacts because it measures base64 string length instead of decoded binary size.
PulseRing, StatusChip, and MessageBubble components duplicated from App.tsx (~80 lines). Should be extracted to shared components.
BrainstormPage uses 'gemini' as message role key while App.tsx uses 'model'. Inconsistent role naming across the codebase.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Frontend Artifact Content Format' section to voidpilot-knowledge.md documenting the dual-format artifact pattern (raw text for markdown, base64 for images) and the requirement to decode base64 before creating download blobs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: When creating new pages that need UI components already present in other pages (StatusChip, MessageBubble, PulseRing), extract them to frontend/src/components/ rather than duplicating. This avoids ~80-line copies across pages.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: brainstorm-page worker duplicated PulseRing, StatusChip, and MessageBubble from App.tsx into BrainstormPage.tsx. With 'model' vs 'gemini' role key difference, this also creates naming inconsistency.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document message role naming convention: decide whether Gemini messages use role 'model' (App.tsx pattern) or 'gemini' (BrainstormPage pattern), and mandate consistency.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: App.tsx uses 'model' role for Gemini messages, BrainstormPage.tsx uses 'gemini'. Two workers made different choices because no convention exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Simplify fullstack-worker skill step 2 for frontend-only features: explicitly state that frontend validation is build+lint (no test-first phase) instead of saying 'Write Tests FIRST' then adding an exception for frontend.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple workers (brainstorm-frontend-deps, brainstorm-hook, brainstorm-page) all noted the skill's test-first instruction is confusing for frontend-only work since no test framework is configured.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker noted ScriptProcessorNode is deprecated and suggested extracting shared AudioWorklet processor to utils/audio.ts.
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a pre-existing pattern inherited from useGeminiLive.ts. Addressing it would require modifying useGeminiLive.ts which is explicitly off-limits in the mission constraints. Not actionable within this mission scope.

rejectedObservations.observation: Worker suggested adding vitest/jest for frontend unit tests as complexity grows.
rejectedObservations.reason: Adding a test framework is a scope expansion beyond this mission. The current validation strategy (build+lint+code review) is documented and adequate for the current codebase size.
